# Copilot Instructions

# Copilot Instructions for Todo App Demo

## Purpose
This repository is a small demo used to showcase AI-assisted software engineering in VS Code using GitHub Copilot with agent-style delegation.

## Demo Goal
Demonstrate how specialized AI agents can help with:
- task planning
- frontend implementation
- README/documentation updates

## Project Scope
Keep the application intentionally small and demo-friendly.

The target app is a simple todo app with:
- add task
- mark complete
- filter by All / Active / Completed
- delete task

## Tech Preferences
- React + TypeScript
- Minimal CSS
- Local component state
- No backend
- Avoid unnecessary dependencies

## Coding Style
- Prefer simple, readable code
- Use explicit TypeScript types where helpful
- Keep components small and focused
- Do not overengineer
- Make incremental changes that are easy to review live

## Behavior Expectations
When responding:
1. State your role if acting as an agent
2. State assumptions briefly
3. Propose a short plan before major implementation
4. Make focused changes only within your role
5. Leave clear handoff notes for the next agent

## Demo Priorities
Optimize for:
- visible progress
- fast execution
- clean explanation
- stable output
- easy handoff between agents

## Constraints
- Do not add backend services
- Do not introduce complex state management
- Do not invent features outside agreed MVP unless explicitly asked
- Keep README accurate to the actual codebase
